William Baron Willoughby d'Eresby 1410 Spilsby, Lincolnshire - artwork on metal sign
memoryArtifacts.description: Artwork on metal sign (owned by Shauna Willoughby) depicting William Baron Willoughby d'Eresby 1410 Spilsby, Lincolnshire - in honour of his burial

memoryArtifacts.headline: Garter stall plate of Sir William de Willoughby
memoryArtifacts.description:
Garter stall plate of William [de Willoughby], 5th Baron Willoughby d'Eresby, KG
A cut-out plate in perfect order representing the arms, which are: Quarterly: 1st and 4th, Sable a
Cross engrailed Or (for Ufford); 2nd and 3rd, Gules a Mill-Iron Argent (for Willoughby), with silvered
helm and silver mantle with red lining branched with gold, and the crest: a Soldan's Head proper crined
Sable crowned Or. The crown is filled in with white enamel. The mantling is unusual in that it reverses
the widely accepted heraldic "rule" that mantling should be a colour lined with a metal or a fur.  Found at
http://www.cracroftspeerage.co.uk/online/content/willoughbye1313.htm

zh.lifeSummary: 當William Willoughby於1371年出生在英國林可爾史爾斯皮爾斯比艾雷斯比時，他的父親Robert de Willoughby IV28歲，母親Elizabeth Latimer28歲。他於1383年1月3日與Lucy le Strange結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1409年12月4日在英國林可爾史爾享年38歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾斯皮爾斯比。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Willoughby于1371年出生在英国林可爾史爾斯皮爾斯比艾雷斯比时，他的父亲Robert de Willoughby IV28岁，母亲Elizabeth Latimer28岁。他于1383年1月3日与Lucy le Strange结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1409年12月4日在英国林可爾史爾享年38岁，埋葬在英国英格兰林可爾史爾斯皮爾斯比。

nameMeanings.name: Willoughby
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Willoughby, for example in Leicestershire, Lincolnshire, Nottinghamshire, and Warwickshire. They are named from an Old English +wilig ‘willow’ + Old Norse bȳ ‘farmstead, village’.

variants.name: Wilby
meanings: habitational name from any of the places called Wilby, in Suffolk, Norfolk, and Northamptonshire. The first placename is probably named from an Old English wilig ‘willow’ + Old English bēag ‘circle, ring’; the Norfolk placename derives from Old English wilig + bēag or Old Norse bý ‘farmstead, village’; the Northamptonshire placename derives from the Old Norse personal name Vili + bý.
Redmonds has demonstrated that in the parish of Hipperholme, and subsequently elsewhere in Yorkshire, Wilby occurs as a variant of Willoughby .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When William Willoughby was born in 1371, in Eresby, Spilsby, Lincolnshire, England, his father, Robert de Willoughby IV, was 28 and his mother, Elizabeth Latimer, was 28. He married Lucy le Strange on 3 January 1383. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 4 December 1409, in Lincolnshire, England, at the age of 38, and was buried in Spilsby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Willoughby est né en 1371, à Eresby, Spilsby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Robert de Willoughby IV, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Latimer, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Lucy le Strange le 3 janvier 1383. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 4 décembre 1409, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 38 ans, et a été enterré à Spilsby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Willoughby 1371 in Eresby, Spilsby, Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert de Willoughby IV 28 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Latimer 28. Er hat am 3. Januar 1383 Lucy le Strange geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 4. Dezember 1409 im Alter von 38 Jahren in Lincolnshire, England und wurde in Spilsby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Willoughby è nato il nel 1371 nel Eresby, Spilsby, Lincolnshire, England, il suo padre, Robert de Willoughby IV, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Latimer, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Lucy le Strange il 3 gennaio 1383. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 4 dicembre 1409, nel Lincolnshire, England, all'età di 38 anni, e fu sepolto a Spilsby, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: William Willoughbyが1371年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアスパルスビーエレスビーで生まれた時，父Robert de Willoughby IVは28歳，母Elizabeth Latimerは28歳であった。1383年1月3日にLucy le Strangeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1409年12月4日にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアで38歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアスパルスビーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Willoughby(이)가 1371년 영국 링코실르 스피스비 레스비에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert de Willoughby IV(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Latimer(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1383년 1월 3일 Lucy le Strange(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1409년 12월 4일 영국 링코실르에서 38세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 스피스비에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Willoughby nasceu em 1371, em Eresby, Spilsby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert de Willoughby IV, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Latimer, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Lucy le Strange em 3 de janeiro de 1383. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 4 de dezembro de 1409, em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, com 38 anos, e foi sepultado em Spilsby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Willoughby родился в 1371 г. в местности эресби, спилсби, линколншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert de Willoughby IV было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Latimer, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Lucy le Strange 3 января 1383 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 4 декабря 1409 г. в местности линколншир, Англия в возрасте 38 лет и был похоронен в местности спилсби, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Willoughby nació en 1371, en Eresby, Spilsby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert de Willoughby IV, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Latimer, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Lucy le Strange el 3 de enero de 1383. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 4 de diciembre de 1409, en Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 38 años, y fue sepultado en Spilsby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
